description: Paths to Glory Patch 3 (4 September 2024) — Season 23 Winner Statues, Mob Changes (Sentry Mages), Destiny Board improvements, Combat Balance Changes (Bows, Crossbows, Cursed Staffs, Daggers, Holy Staffs, Nature Staffs, Shapeshifter Staffs, Spears, War Gloves, Armors, Battle Mounts, Other), Fixes.

sections.heading: Season 23 Winner Statues
sections.description: Statues for Season 23 winners IFures, PLAC, and Sex and Flex have been unveiled in their respective servers' Conqueror's Hall.
sections.searchable_text: Season 23 Winner Statues IFures PLAC Sex and Flex Conquerors Hall

sections.heading: Changes
items: Sentry Mages no longer auto-regenerate health, but their maximum health has been increased: Max health: 61,458 → 68,287
Improved Destiny Board camera stability when zoomed out
Improved number readability and reduced overall glare in Destiny Board
sections.searchable_text: Changes Sentry Mages auto-regenerate health Max health 61458 68287 Destiny Board camera stability zoomed out number readability glare

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Celestial Sphere Redemption Staff Bounces 10 8 Area of Effect 0 4m Heal 85 77 Divine Protection Divine Staff AoE Heal manual reactivate Affected Allies 5 10

changes.raw_text: Celestial Sphere: Bounces: 10 → 8; Area of Effect: 0 → 4m; Heal: 85 → 77
Divine Protection AoE Heal: No longer triggers automatically when the shield expires; spell can now be manually reactivated to detonate the shield and trigger AoE heal. Affected Allies: 5 → 10.
notes: AoE Heal no longer triggers automatically when the shield expires
Spell can now be manually reactivated to detonate the shield and trigger the AoE heal

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Multiple Albion Journal fixes: Wisps delivery party members, Faction Champions Martlock, enchanted resources, extinct mobs, open-world Treasures in Mists, Static Dungeons kills, Tomes of Insight/Fishes Fame, changed conditions, Dryad Guardians
Limitbreaker (Infinity Blade): fixed issue where second attack would deal less damage than intended
Triple Kick (War Gloves): fixed issue where players with immunity to Forced Movement could be pulled
Harpoon (all Spears): fixed issue with targets not reliably being hit at max range
Fixed tooltips for Deathward Climax (Boltcasters), Separator, Lucent Hawk, and Premonition (Boots of Valor)
Fixed issue where some tooltips displayed incorrect defense reduction stats
Fixed issue where enchantment level for potions could not be selected when creating a Buy Order through the Marketplace
[Mobile] Improved active state behavior of party, quest and journal HUD elements
Fixed issue where Embalmed Tiger skin could not be traded after its non-tradable period expired
Fixed issue where players would not encounter the intended Roaming Mobs when Tracking in the Roads of Avalon
Fixed rare issue where players could lose all buffs if disconnected while changing regions
Fixed issue where players could be dismounted after collecting Silver with auto-pickup enabled
Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
